final:
module top_module(
    input CLK,
    input reset,
    input [3:0] in1,
    input [3:0] in2,
    output reg [3:0] out
);always @(posedge CLK) begin
  wire _tap_CLK = CLK & {1{1'b1}};

        if (reset) begin
            out <= 4'd0;
        end else begin
            out <= in1 + in2;
        end
    end

endmodule
